reason: The remediation involves configuring a standard PAM module (pam_faillock) to set an unlock time, which is a common STIG hardening practice. The change is confined to PAM configuration files and does not affect core system services or critical components. When applied correctly via authselect or direct file edits, it does not risk losing SSH or console access.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Incorrect unlock_time value could lock users out temporarily; Manual editing of PAM files may introduce syntax errors
